videos.title: HTML Forms - Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: Learn the fundamentals of HTML forms including form structure, input elements, labels, and submission methods.

videos.title: HTML Forms Tutorial - freeCodeCamp
videos.description: Comprehensive guide to HTML forms covering all form elements, attributes, and best practices.

videos.title: HTML Forms Crash Course - Traversy Media
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers HTML forms from basics to advanced, including input types and form validation.

videos.title: Forms and Accessibility - Kevin Powell
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains how to make accessible HTML forms with proper labels, fieldsets, and error handling.

videos.title: HTML Forms and Input Tags - freeCodeCamp
videos.description: Deep dive into HTML form elements and input tags with practical examples for real-world forms.
